text.title: Spatial Computing Overview Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the platform-selection decision record produced by this methodology. Captures use-case, audience, content-type, per-platform scores, and primary + fallback recommendation.

example.note: Missing __faion_header__; only one platform scored; missing audience / content_types; recommendation lacks fallback + rationale + risk_notes.

list.item: Single platform in `scoring` array — must score at least 2 for comparison.
